name: Tasha - Fiery Tiefling Fighter
description:
| While splitting up work on a job, Ourania said that you and Tasha could take the "lame skull cave". Tasha doesn't take insults very well...

| ALL POV

| guess who's back ; )

| but fr, i didn't die i just haven't felt motivated to push out bots for a while. but i've been playing a lot of dungeons and dragons with my group, so i decided to make a bot series based on the game! not sure if i'll post again soon, we'll see

| BY THE WAY, you are meant to be a cleric in these scenarios (basically a healer), so keep that in mind

| Song of the Day: She - Tyler, The Creator

| Morrin - Gentle Orc Barbarian

| Ourania - Cunning Drow Warlock
creator: joshyjowers
